prompt:
Scene:
A tall 9:16 culinary-rivalry cover in a high-end restaurant prep kitchen after service, with stainless counters, steam haze, one hanging pendant lamp, and a palette of black, copper, cream, and deep basil green. The composition should feel tuned for app discovery surfaces: eye-catching top steam silhouette, center clash between leads, and a calmer lower band for future unreadable title and badge placement. Keep the environment tactile but controlled.

Subject:
Create a short-drama cover featuring two rival chefs. One is a disciplined woman in a dark apron holding a scorched recipe notebook; the other is a celebrated male chef in rolled sleeves, leaning across the counter with a plated dessert he has no right to finish. Their tension should read as rivalry with romantic undertow. A pastry blowtorch, folded kitchen towel, and one cracked sugar sculpture are enough to establish the world. The narrow frame must prioritize faces, hands, and emotional distance over broad kitchen coverage.

Important details:
The poster should sell a serialized food-industry melodrama, not a cooking show. Use steam, metal reflections, notebook texture, and plated dessert detail to create premium realism, but maintain strong vertical negative space so the composition still works as a platform cover. Suggest title and episode-chip zones with layout rhythm only. The hook must be instantly readable at thumbnail size: burnt notebook, stolen plate, eye contact.

Use case:
Vertical Drama Poster System single study 9/9, testing a chef-rivalry romance hook in a polished mobile-cover poster system.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 9:16 aspect ratio, no cheerful cooking-show mood, no crowded brigade kitchen, no food close-up dominating the frame, no slapstick mess, no obvious TV studio lighting, no interface chrome, no broken hands.
title: Chef Rivalry Cover
description: A polished restaurant-rivalry cover designed for mobile-first readability and dramatic chemistry.

generation.runner_notes: Independent vertical-drama cover study for a chef-rivalry hook poster.

en.title: Chef Rivalry Cover
en.description: A polished restaurant-rivalry cover designed for mobile-first readability and dramatic chemistry.

zh-CN.title: 主厨对决封面
zh-CN.description: 一张为移动端可读性与情感火花而设计的餐厅对抗短剧封面。

alt.en: Two rival chefs face each other across a prep counter in a steamy tall short-drama cover.
alt.zh-CN: 两位对立主厨隔着备餐台彼此对视，构成一张带蒸汽感的高竖幅短剧封面。
